title: John Arnold
compiled_truth: John Arnold is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-02-25), John Arnold sent 2369 and received 1453 emails, totalling 3822 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jennifer Fraser](people/jennifer-fraser) (153), [Ina Rangel](people/ina-rangel) (139), [Slafontaine](people/slafontaine-globalp) (116), [Mike Maggi](people/mike-maggi) (111), [Margaret Allen](people/margaret-allen) (105). Mailbox folders observed: _sent_mail, deleted_items, inbox, sent, sent_items.
